title: quercus × rotensis
intro: Quercus × rotundifolia, also known as the Rotund-leaved Oak, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Quercus robur and Quercus petraea oak trees. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus × rotundifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark of the Quercus × rotundifolia tree is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
